name: PosInjectionStateUpdateEvent
description: Event that describes current POS injection state

injectionState.description:
Injection state for an order. 
 * `UNKNOWN` Injection state unknown. 
 * `SUCCEEDED` Injection has succeeded. 
 * `INJECTION_FAILING` Injection attempts failing. Will retry. 
 * `INJECTION_FAILED` Injection Failed. 
 * `MANUAL_INJECTION_SUCCEEDED` Injection was done manually. 
 * `MANUAL_INJECTION_REQUIRED` Manual injection is required. 
 * `SUCCEEDED_WITH_UNLINKED_ITEMS` Injection has succeeded, but there were open items.

injectionIssue.description:
Injection issue for an order. * `UNKNOWN_INJECTION_ISSUE`: The issue is unknown. 
 * `NO_INJECTABLE_EXTERNAL_SERVICE`: No external service is available for injection. 
 * `ITEM_MAPPING_FAILED`: Failed to map items from the order. 
 * `INCOMPLETE_ITEM_MAPPING`: Some items could not be mapped, but others were successfully injected. 
 * `UNKNOWN_ORDER_ISSUE`: The order has an unidentified issue preventing injection. 
 * `ORDER_TOO_OLD`: The order is too old to be injected. 
 * `ORDER_IMMUTABLE`: The order cannot be modified or injected. 
 * `ORDER_ORIGINATED_FROM_POS`: The order originated from the POS system and does not require injection. 
 * `ORDER_PENDING_ACCEPT_EXPIRED`: The order was not accepted in time, preventing injection. 
 * `INTEGRATION_ERROR`: A general integration error occurred during injection.
